subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness unto Thee, and all things bear witness, at this moment wherein I stood before Thee, known for my shortcomings and beholding Thy decrees, that Thou art God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الله. و سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاشهدنک و کل شی حین الذی کنت عندک معروفا بالقصاری و ناظرا بالقضایا و بانک انت الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for morning
